title: Support - Product Support no wifi [New]
scenario: "Something is wrong" screen appears when navigating to Product Support in Lens app with Wi-Fi turned off
steps: 1. Turn off Wi-Fi on the device.
3. Navigate to App Settings → Support → Product Support.
4. Observe the "Something is wrong" screen displayed.
expected: The "Something is wrong" screen is dismissed and the user is returned to the Support first screen.
